name: otterbridge
description: Drive your real Chrome browser from any AI agent through the Otter extension.
long_description: OtterBridge lets AI agents observe and act in your real Chrome browser: read pages, find text, list interactive elements, click, fill forms, pick dropdown options, hover, drag, scroll, navigate, wait for dynamic content, and take viewport or full-page screenshots. It also captures the console and network traffic for web-app debugging. It talks to the companion Otter Chrome extension over a localhost-only WebSocket. Clicks on destructive controls (buy, pay, delete, send, submit, ...) require your approval first, and evaluate_js stays off unless you enable it in the extension options. Everything runs on your machine; no browsing data leaves it.

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate a tab to a URL.

tools.name: go_back
tools.description: Go back in the tab's history.

tools.name: go_forward
tools.description: Go forward in the tab's history.

tools.name: reload
tools.description: Reload the tab, optionally bypassing the cache.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Read a tab's URL, title, and visible text (paginated).

tools.name: read_elements
tools.description: List interactive elements with indices and coordinates.

tools.name: find_text
tools.description: Find text on the page and get clickable coordinates.

tools.name: wait_for
tools.description: Wait for text or a CSS selector to appear.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture the viewport (or full page) as an image.

tools.name: click_element
tools.description: Click an interactive element by index (preferred, drift-free).

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click at viewport coordinates (x, y).

tools.name: fill_element
tools.description: Focus a field, clear it, and type text into it.

tools.name: select_option
tools.description: Pick an option in a native <select> dropdown.

tools.name: hover
tools.description: Hover over an element or coordinates.

tools.name: drag
tools.description: Drag from one point to another (sliders, reordering).

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text into the focused element.

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key (Enter, Tab, Escape, ...).

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page vertically.

tools.name: read_console
tools.description: Read captured console output and page errors.

tools.name: read_network
tools.description: List captured network requests.

tools.name: get_network_body
tools.description: Fetch a captured response body by requestId.

tools.name: evaluate_js
tools.description: Run JavaScript in the page (opt-in + per-call approval).

tools.name: open_tab
tools.description: Open a new tab in this session's tab group.

tools.name: list_tabs
tools.description: List this session's tabs.

tools.name: use_tab
tools.description: Set this session's current tab.

tools.name: close_tab
tools.description: Close a tab this session opened.

gate_enabled.title: Require approval for destructive clicks
gate_enabled.description: Ask for confirmation before clicking controls like Buy, Pay, Delete, Send, or Submit. Strongly recommended.

fallback_allow.title: Allow destructive clicks when approval can't be shown
fallback_allow.description: If the app can't display an approval prompt, allow the click anyway. Leave OFF for fail-safe (blocked) behavior.
